proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_009 == 1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `feature_009 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_009 == 1` and `feature_030 == 0` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `dependency_BRAF` was much more negative in `feature_009 == 1` lines (mean -0.8047) than in `feature_009 == 0` lines (mean -0.2495), supporting the hypothesis.

analyses.method: Systematic pair-subgroup search followed by Welch-style contrast
analyses.result_summary: The strongest pair subgroup retained `feature_009 == 1`; adding `feature_030 == 0` gave mean -0.8055 versus -0.2540 outside the subgroup, but did not materially improve over `feature_009 == 1` alone.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_022 == 1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `feature_022 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_022 == 1`, `feature_023 >= 5.669`, and `feature_015 <= 3.230` have especially negative `dependency_EGFR` scores compared with all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_022 == 1` strongly marked EGFR dependency: mean `dependency_EGFR` was -0.6010 versus -0.2524 in the rest of the dataset.

analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over pair and triple predicates
analyses.result_summary: A refined subgroup with `feature_022 == 1`, high `feature_023`, and low `feature_015` had still more negative `dependency_EGFR` (mean -0.6714) than all other lines (mean -0.2775).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_024 == 1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `feature_024 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_024 == 1`, `feature_011 == breast`, and `feature_013 >= 0.519` have especially negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores compared with all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_024 == 1` was the dominant ERBB2 dependency marker: mean -0.6856 versus -0.2535 outside the subgroup.

analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over pair and triple predicates
analyses.result_summary: The most concentrated ERBB2 subgroup combined `feature_024 == 1`, breast lineage (`feature_011 == breast`), and high `feature_013`, with mean -0.7597 versus -0.2930 outside the subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_014 == 1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `feature_014 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_011 == pancreatic` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than non-pancreatic cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_014 == 1`, `feature_016 >= 1.088`, and `feature_028 <= -0.406` have especially negative `dependency_KRAS` scores compared with all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_014 == 1` strongly supported KRAS dependency, with mean -0.5594 versus -0.2520 outside the subgroup.
Pancreatic lines (`feature_011 == pancreatic`) also had more negative `dependency_KRAS`, but the effect was smaller than the `feature_014 == 1` marker.

analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over pair and triple predicates
analyses.result_summary: The strongest KRAS refined subgroup combined `feature_014 == 1`, high `feature_016`, and low `feature_028`, with mean -0.6640 versus -0.3230 outside the subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_027 == 1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `feature_027 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_027 == 1`, `feature_011 == brain`, and `feature_008 == 0` have especially negative `dependency_RIT1` scores compared with all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_027 == 1` marked stronger RIT1 dependency, with mean -0.3527 compared with -0.2572 outside the subgroup.

analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over pair and triple predicates
analyses.result_summary: RIT1 dependency was more concentrated in the `feature_011 == brain`, `feature_027 == 1`, `feature_008 == 0` subgroup, with mean -0.4315 versus -0.2651 outside.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_011 == colorectal` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_028 >= 1.427` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with lower `feature_028`.

Cell lines with `feature_011 == colorectal`, `feature_028 >= 1.427`, `feature_020 == 0`, and `feature_035 == 1` have markedly more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines; `feature_020 == 1` or `feature_035 == 0` suppresses this dependency.

analyses.result_summary: Colorectal lines had substantially more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other lines.
High `feature_028` also marked stronger KIF18A dependency, supporting a second component of the subgroup rule.

analyses.method: Focused complete-subgroup contrast after systematic heterogeneity search
analyses.result_summary: The complete rule `feature_011 == colorectal`, `feature_028 >= 1.427`, `feature_020 == 0`, and `feature_035 == 1` produced the strongest signal: mean -1.3952 versus -0.2678 outside the subgroup.

analyses.method: Suppressor check within colorectal high-feature_028 lines
analyses.result_summary: Among colorectal high-`feature_028` lines, those with `feature_020 == 1` had near-background `dependency_KIF18A` (mean -0.2642), consistent with `feature_020 == 0` being required for the strong dependency.

analyses.method: Suppressor check within colorectal high-feature_028 lines
analyses.result_summary: Among colorectal high-`feature_028` lines, those with `feature_035 == 0` also had near-background `dependency_KIF18A` (mean -0.2849), consistent with `feature_035 == 1` being required.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_016 >= 1.088` have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than cell lines with lower `feature_016`.
Cell lines with `feature_016 >= 1.088`, `feature_026 >= 1.153`, and `feature_004 == adherent` have especially negative `dependency_TMED10` scores compared with all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: High `feature_016` was the clearest TMED10 dependency marker, though the effect was modest.

analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over pair and triple predicates
analyses.result_summary: The strongest refined TMED10 subgroup combined high `feature_016`, high `feature_026`, and adherent growth state (`feature_004 == adherent`).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_016 >= 1.088` have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than cell lines with lower `feature_016`.
Cell lines with `feature_023 >= 6.330` have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than cell lines with lower `feature_023`.
Cell lines with `feature_016 >= 1.088`, `feature_023 >= 5.669`, and `feature_020 == 1` have especially negative `dependency_DHX9` scores compared with all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: High `feature_016` was associated with more negative DHX9 dependency.
High `feature_023` also marked more negative DHX9 dependency.

analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over pair and triple predicates
analyses.result_summary: The strongest DHX9 subgroup combined high `feature_016`, high `feature_023`, and `feature_020 == 1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_016 >= 1.088` have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than cell lines with lower `feature_016`.
Cell lines with `feature_016 >= 1.088`, `feature_018 == 1`, and `feature_005 == batch_c` have especially negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores compared with all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: High `feature_016` was the dominant POLR2A dependency marker.

analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over pair and triple predicates
analyses.result_summary: The strongest refined POLR2A subgroup added `feature_018 == 1` and batch indicator `feature_005 == batch_c` to high `feature_016`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_003 >= 1.003` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines with lower `feature_003`.
Cell lines with `feature_018 == 1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines with `feature_018 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_003 >= 1.003`, `feature_016 >= 0.964`, and `feature_033 >= 0.602` have especially negative `dependency_RPL11` scores compared with all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: High `feature_003` was the strongest RPL11 marker, with mean -0.3831 versus -0.2573 outside the subgroup.
`feature_018 == 1` independently marked more negative RPL11 dependency.

analyses.method: Systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over pair and triple predicates
analyses.result_summary: The strongest refined RPL11 subgroup combined high `feature_003`, high `feature_016`, and high `feature_033`.
